note: The standing calibration corpus (mandate S12 / §9.3). Six seeded defect classes the pipeline must catch. The heartbeat re-injects these on a schedule; a class the pipeline stops catching is a FAILED GATE and freezes releases. Corpus grows with every real defect found and every incident (§9.9).

defects.inject: embed a bg_live_sk_/X-API-Key secret idiom in bubblegauge.jsx
weaken KEY_RE re-validation before base-URL construction
bump a pinned CDN version (e.g. react@18.3.2) leaving stale SRI
make a catch handler return a fabricated 2xx status
